footer.tagline: Knowledge retention through expert shadowing and custom wikis.
footer.bottomTagline: Transforming tacit knowledge into strategic assets.

hero.title: Knowledge Retention
hero.subtitle2: We transform tacit knowledge into strategic assets

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: MESTRIA: Because knowledge is the only asset that appreciates when shared.

mission.title: MISSION
mission.content:
At MESTRIA, we don't just manage resources; we protect your industry's intellectual capital. We specialize in capturing and systematizing technical knowledge in sectors of high complexity and risk, where a "Master's" retirement cannot mean the loss of decades of innovation.

Through a rigorous Analytical Shadowing methodology and the creation of custom Engineering Wikis, we ensure that the critical know-how of your operation — especially in the production and/or transformation of aluminium profiles obtained by extrusion — is properly documented, transferred and scaled.

founder.name: Maria João Oliveira
founder.title: Founder
founder.bio: Specialist with 25 years of experience in the aluminum profile production and transformation industry, focused on supply chain optimization and managing teams of up to 80 people. Certified trainer (CCP), with a strong vocation for technical knowledge transfer and coordination of multidisciplinary teams.
founder.highlight1: Postgraduate in Logistics and Transport Management — Coimbra Business School
founder.highlight2: Degree in Environmental Engineering — University of Aveiro
founder.highlight3: Power BI, Lean/Kaizen, Customs Management, International Logistics (EU/USA)
founder.highlight4: Qualified for Higher Education teaching (CTeSP and Degrees)
education: Postgraduate in Logistics and Transport Management — Coimbra Business School
Degree in Environmental Engineering — University of Aveiro
skills: Qualified for Higher Education teaching (CTeSP and Degrees)

inMemory.title: In Memory
inMemory.quote: This project is born from my experience with Mestre Abel. It honours him and all the masters who have been part of my life. Some have already departed. To all of them, my deepest gratitude.

cta.title: Join Our Mission
cta.description: We are looking for organizations that want to preserve their expert knowledge and build a future-proof team.

solutions.pageIntro: Custom approaches designed to preserve and transfer your critical expertise

knowledgeRetention.title: Knowledge Retention
knowledgeRetention.intro: When a specialist leaves, the knowledge doesn't have to go with them.

approach.title: Shadowing + Wiki
steps: Audit and diagnosis: mapping the «knowledge map» (which masters hold which expertise)
Infrastructure creation: installation and configuration of customized Wiki
Initial content production: distilled and recorded knowledge modules (e.g. pack of 5 videos of critical processes)

training.title: Training & Certification
training.intro: Turn onboarding into a competitive advantage with structured training and skills certification.

approach.title: On-the-Job Training
steps: Apprentice support plans (charged per hour or per trainee)
Training based on the company Wiki, at the workstation
Performance assessments integrated into learning modules

wikiCreation.title: Wiki Creation & Digitization
wikiCreation.intro: From paper to digital — or from zero to a complete Wiki.

digitization.title: Archive Digitization to Wiki
steps: Analysis and curation of existing work instruction archive
Conversion to Wiki format with visual and interactive stories

fromScratch.title: Wiki Built from Scratch
steps: Complete process mapping with the existing team
Definition and structuring of all knowledge modules

benefits.title: Risk Mitigation
benefits.description: Ensure critical knowledge stays with your organization

benefits.title: Scalability
benefits.description: Systematized knowledge can be easily transferred and replicated

benefits.title: Continuous Improvement
benefits.description: Living documentation that evolves with your operations

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Knowledge?
cta.description: Let's discuss which solution best fits your organization's needs.
